title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 18 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 18 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 18 2026
summary:
Main
The iron ore benchmark contract I2609 traded on a weak note today, finally closing at 747 yuan/ton,down 1.13%. Port spot prices remained broadly unchanged from yesterday. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills stayed cautious and purchased only on an as-needed basis, with weak restocking appetite.
